subject: DQ BLOCK: 27+ Events Missing venue_id — Cannot Load
body:
Booker,

## Issue

27+ future events in fb_conditioner.sqlite have no `venue_id` set.
Without venue linking, Porter cannot load to MongoDB.

## Sample Events (no venue_id)

| ID | Title | City |
|----|-------|------|
| 45650 | 台中探戈藝術交流節 | (Taiwan) |
| 45685 | Tango Week Marathon, Crete | (Greece) |
| 45731 | TAHITI TANGO HOLIDAYS | (French Polynesia) |
| 46311 | Caltech Milonga | Pasadena |
| 46199 | All Night Milonga | Berkeley |
| 46027 | Che Milonga | San Francisco |
| 46028 | Firehouse 5 - Milonga | Sacramento |

## Root Cause

Events have venue_name but no `venue_id` FK.
Venues may exist but aren't linked.

## Action Needed

1. Find/create venues for these events
2. Set `venue_id` FK in fb_events table
3. Ensure venues have geocodes

## Query to Find Unlinked

```sql
SELECT id, title, venue_name, city 
FROM fb_events 
WHERE venue_id IS NULL 
  AND start_dt > datetime('now');
```

— Porter
